empathetic_output.support_response: We value your trust and satisfaction above everything else, and we will do our best to make things right. Please accept our sincerest apologies for any inconvenience caused by this mistake. Our team will work diligently to resolve this issue promptly and provide you with a full refund along with an expedited replacement unit. If there's anything further we can do to assist you during this unfortunate situation, please don't hesitate to reach out to us directly.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I am FURIOUS right now, I just opened the box for the SmartHome Hub Pro, order number ORD-4500, in front of my family and IT'S A COFFEE MAKER INSIDE, CAN YOU BELIEVE THAT?! I paid for EXPRESS SHIPPING so I could get it on time for my wife's birthday, which is in TWO DAYS, and now I've been left with a COMPLETELY USELESS ITEM. I demand to know what happened and I expect a FULL REFUND, as well as a working SmartHome Hub Pro to be shipped to me IMMEDIATELY, or I'll be forced to take my business elsewhere and leave a scathing review. I want to speak to a MANAGER if necessary to get this RESOLVED NOW.

Please allow us some time to resolve these issues before reaching out again regarding further assistance.
